nasb.text: Therefore I say to you, the kingdom of God will be taken away from you and given to a people, producing the fruit of it.

esv.text: Therefore I tell you, the kingdom of God     will be taken away from you and given to a people     producing its fruits.

cnv.text: 因此我告訴你們，　神的國要從你們那裡取去，賜給那結果子的外族人。

ccb.text: 所以，我告诉你们，将把上帝的国从你们那里夺去，赐给结果子的人。

csbs.text: 为此，我告诉你们：神的国要从你们中间被夺走，赐给那结神国果子的人。
